_schema_notes.description: USARM Claims Platform — Claim Configuration Schema
_schema_notes.usage: Copy this file to claims/{address-slug}/claim_config.json and fill in all fields.
_schema_notes.required_fields: All fields without '_OPTIONAL' in their name are required. Remove _OPTIONAL suffix and fill in, or delete the field entirely.
_schema_notes.photo_setup: 1) Extract photos: pdfimages -j companycam.pdf photos/page  2) Copy logo: cp usarm_logo.jpg photos/

carrier.name: Insurance Company Name

carrier_line_items.dispute_note_OPTIONAL: Why this carrier line item is inadequate — links to photo evidence

carrier_arguments: Reason 1 why carrier scope is inadequate
Reason 2 why carrier scope is inadequate
carrier_acknowledged_items_OPTIONAL: Items carrier DID approve (used in appeal letter logical inconsistency argument)

inspectors._note: Use usarm_inspector for single inspector, usarm_inspectors array for multiple

scope._trades_note: Common trades: roofing, gutters, siding, interior, painting. O&P auto-applies when 3+ trades.
scope.o_and_p_note_OPTIONAL: Single trade involved; O&P does not apply per industry standard (3+ trades required).

weather.storm_description: Severe thunderstorm with X" diameter hail
weather.nws_warning_tag_OPTIONAL: Hail: X.XX in | Wind: XX mph | Source: NWS

line_items._note: code field is optional. category groups items in estimate table.

photo_map._note: Optional. Maps annotation keys to photo filenames. Use for ZIP-based photo imports where filenames don't follow pageNN_imgNN convention. When present, generator uses this instead of page/img glob matching.

photo_annotations._note: Keys match photo files. Format: p{page}_{img} e.g. p03_01 for page03_img01
photo_annotations.p03_01: Description of what this photo shows — forensic observation

photo_sections._format_note: Two formats supported: flat (photos array) or subsections (photo_range). Pick one.

subsections.subtitle: Subsection Title
subsections.callout_OPTIONAL: Important note displayed as highlight box

photo_sections.title: Section Title — Update This

forensic_findings.damage_summary: Overall summary of hail/storm damage found during inspection

fieldassist_findings_OPTIONAL._note: Include ONLY if carrier used FieldAssist/Accurence for inspection
contradictions: Contradiction between inspector findings and scope

repairability_OPTIONAL._note: Method of Repair Analysis — auto-populated from scoring data or manually specified. Triggers dedicated forensic report section documenting why spot repair is not feasible.
repairability_OPTIONAL._exposure_type_options: pre_metric_standard | metric | iko_advantage | tamko_vintage | atlas_variant | transitional_metric
reasons: No manufacturer currently produces shingles with 5-inch exposure
Nailing zones incompatible between standard and metric dimensions (GAF SS-TS-03 vs SS-TS-03a)
5/8-inch per-course offset compounds to 12.5 inches over 20 courses
Field cutting does not resolve nailing zone incompatibility and voids warranty
repairability_OPTIONAL.conclusion: Full replacement of the roof system is the only method of repair.

evidence_map._note: One entry per disputed/added line item. Links line items to their supporting evidence.

evidence.description: Close-up of copper counter flashing with hail dents and patina consistent with pre-loss installation
Counter flashing: 22 LF per EagleView report
Flashing required at all roof-to-wall intersections and chimneys
1.75" hail confirmed at property location on date of loss

evidence_map.carrier_challenge: Anticipated carrier pushback on this item
evidence_map.rebuttal: Our response citing evidence, codes, and forensic standards

compliance._note: UPPA Compliance — Role-based document language. Controls whether documents use advocacy language (PAs/attorneys) or safe contractor language. Default: contractor with AOB.
compliance._has_aob_note: Relevant for contractors. With AOB, slightly more direct language and carrier scope references are permitted. Without AOB, pure contractor scope with no carrier references.

dashboard._note: Dashboard display data — used by sync_dashboard.py to update Google Sheets and embedded fallback. Generator ignores this section.
dashboard._phase_options: Pre-Scope | Supplement Filed | Appraisal | Settled | Litigation
dashboard.primary_tactic: Short summary of carrier's main underpayment tactic (1 sentence)

email_sequences._note: Email tracking for automated follow-up sequences. Managed by /send-email and /check-followups slash commands. Generator ignores this section.
email_sequences._statuses: not_started | awaiting_response | carrier_responded | escalated | completed | paused

demand_items: Issue a revised scope acknowledging full roof replacement
Process this claim within 15 business days per 11 NYCRR 216.4(b)

summary_paragraphs: Brief paragraph summarizing the claim and what's being submitted
highlight_paragraphs_OPTIONAL: Key point to emphasize (rendered in highlight box)

photo_integrity_OPTIONAL._note: Auto-populated by fraud_detection module. Do not edit manually.
